description: Remedy Legal provides AI-assisted support for renters dealing with housing disputes in the UK, including deposit disputes, disrepair, eviction, and rent repayment issues. Its site also describes partner workflows for advice organisations and law firms to receive and manage referred cases.
summary: No public developer integration surface found for remedylegal.ai: the domain exposes a marketing site and a logged-in web app for end users, but no documented HTTP API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI on remedylegal.ai subdomains.
